messages.content: Legacy pattern: broad catch with silent failure in report generation flow.
Legacy anti-pattern: expose raw exception detail directly to UI in controller.
Legacy service code returns null on failure without typed exception.
Legacy detection notes: inconsistent exception typing and generic catch(any).
Legacy performance flow: retries and fallback paths not isolated, causing noisy controller error logic.
Log error detail internally while returning a user-safe message to the caller.
Retry an unreliable external call with a bounded attempt count before giving up.
Wrap a third-party library call to isolate its exceptions and rethrow with typed context.
Add FW/1 controller-level error handling that sets a prc error message and redirects.
Use finally to guarantee resource cleanup regardless of exception outcome.
